prestazioni: Upgrade the supercharged 5.2L V8 (engine code: *Voodoo* with *Predator* variant, cross-plane crank) with a Whipple 4.5L Gen 5 supercharger kit (3.0L pulley, 14-15 psi boost) paired with a custom Livernois Motorsports Stage 3+ ECU calibration (93 octane, aggressive ignition timing, and optimized air-fuel ratios for 950+ WHP on E85)

Replace the stock cast-iron exhaust manifolds with long-tube stainless steel headers (Kooks 1 7/8" primary tubes, 3" merge collectors) and a full titanium Borla Atak cat-back system (4" dual outlets, straight-through mufflers, and resonated X-pipe for backpressure optimization)

Install a full billet aluminum drivetrain reinforcement package (ATI Super Damper 9.5" dual-mass flywheel, Spec Stage 5+ twin-disc clutch, and a Ford Performance 3.73:1 Torsen differential with carbon fiber driveshaft and billet aluminum differential cover)
estetica: Fit a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts with integrated canards and diffuser) paired with a custom Vorsteiner GTS II carbon fiber hood (heat extractor vents, aggressive scoop, and dual strut braces)

Replace the stock wheels with a set of HRE FF16 flow-formed forged wheels (20x11 front, 20x12 rear, ET25 front/ET45 rear, finished in Brushed Titanium) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30/20 front, 325/30/20 rear) with custom TPMS sensors

Install a full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension system (Dahlback Racing-spec valving, 3-way adjustable dampers, and adjustable camber plates) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, paired with a Cusco front strut tower bar and a full carbon fiber underbody brace kit (Vorshlag Motorsport)
